title: Data Engineer
summary: Builds and maintains data pipelines, storage, and models that deliver trustworthy data to downstream consumers.
responsibilities: Design and operate ingestion and transformation pipelines
Model and maintain storage schemas for analytical and operational use
Enforce data quality, validation, and lineage
Make curated datasets available to downstream consumers
Monitor pipeline health, freshness, and cost
boundaries: Does not define product analyses or statistical conclusions
Does not own application business logic or user interfaces
Does not make infrastructure or deployment decisions unilaterally
Does not expose data that violates access or privacy controls
